overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban plaza in a game engine environment (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring the MedCenter building with distinctive orange structural elements. The camera moves from a covered street through a green pedestrian plaza with benches and trees, enters a covered hospital driveway, and exits along a commercial sidewalk with digital billboards.

events.description: moves from under the orange support structures onto the teal-colored pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking past vehicles under the orange structural columns toward the open pedestrian plaza

silver sports car parked on the right curb

red and white medical center signage on the building facade
distinctive teal-colored paved pedestrian walkway with white markings
tall futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under large orange structural supports with vehicles passing by on the asphalt road. The camera moves forward onto a distinctive teal pedestrian walkway, transitioning from the sheltered street to an open plaza area with the MedCenter building visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with integrated seating and landscaping

events.description: slight turn to the right while continuing forward through the plaza

person sitting on a yellow-green bench facing the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open sunlit plaza with mature trees in large planters and modern benches where NPCs are seated. The MedCenter building remains visible on the left while the camera passes contemporary seating areas and digital signage on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza approaching medical center entrance with overhead walkways

events.description: slight left turn aligning toward the MedCenter entrance driveway

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza toward the MedCenter entrance, passing groups of seated individuals and pedestrians

person in bright purple jacket sitting on a bench

elevated walkway connecting buildings above the plaza

segments.scene_description: Approaching the MedCenter entrance through the landscaped plaza, with the building's signage becoming more prominent. The camera passes under an overhead skybridge and moves toward the covered entrance area, with pedestrians and seated NPCs visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered hospital entrance driveway with vehicle access

events.description: enters the covered MedCenter driveway from the open plaza, lighting shifts to shadowed interior
white futuristic sedan drives past from right to left exiting the covered area

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered entrance area of the MedCenter, moving from bright outdoor light into the shadowed driveway with green railings

notable_agents.action: white futuristic sedan with red trim driving out of the covered entrance
woman in white outfit standing near the entrance wall looking at a device

entered.detail: shadowed covered entrance with green metal railings and concrete ramps
large digital display showing animated content on the interior wall
industrial ventilation units mounted on the ceiling with visible steam

segments.scene_description: Entering the covered driveway of the MedCenter where the environment shifts from bright natural light to shadowed artificial lighting. A white vehicle exits the driveway while pedestrians move in and out of the entrance. Digital screens and industrial ventilation elements line the walls and ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along commercial building with digital advertising

events.description: exits the covered driveway back to outdoor sidewalk alongside the building
turns right to follow the building facade along the teal pedestrian path

agents.ego_description: exiting the MedCenter driveway and walking along the building sidewalk past digital billboards and various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with tattoos and brown jacket walking toward the camera
person sitting on the ground against the wall near a pile of trash bags

entered.detail: large screen displaying animated advertisement with a woman's face
pile of white and black garbage bags stacked against the building wall
dark glass office building with horizontal lines across the facade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered driveway onto a sidewalk lined with large digital billboards and urban details including trash bags piled against the wall. The camera turns right to follow the building facade, passing various pedestrians in a commercial district with modern office buildings visible across the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban street through a sunlit pedestrian plaza and into the shadowed entrance of a medical facility before emerging back into a commercial district. It begins under massive orange structural supports beside a busy road, moving forward onto a teal pedestrian walkway that opens into a bright plaza. As the camera glides past mature trees in planters and modern benches occupied by NPCs, the MedCenter building grows more prominent on the left before the path leads under an overhead skybridge. The scene then shifts from natural sunlight to artificial shadows as the camera enters the MedCenter's covered driveway, passing a white vehicle and industrial ventilation systems. Finally, the camera exits the driveway onto a sidewalk lined with large digital billboards and urban debris, turning right to follow the building facade through a bustling commercial area.
